Times and fares Bexley [BXY] to London Bridge [LBG]

  • Travelcard fares From £23.60
  • with Oyster or Contactless (pay as you go) from £8.50
  • "Set up journey alerts"

Other cheap fares

Other cheap fares?

This is the cheapest fare of the five journeys shown below and is from Bexley to London Bridge .

The cheapest fare applies to all passengers and railcards that have been added.

Where two journeys have the same fare, we've highlighted the first to depart.

There may be cheaper fares at other times of the day or on different dates - use our cheapest fare finder.

Outward journey on Mon 29 Jun

About journeys that require more than one ticket

Show the cheapest

filter your journey details

Advance fares offer great value for money when you book in advance and travel on a specific train. Find out more about Advance tickets.

Cheaper tickets for travelling at quieter times, for example outside the rush hour. Find out more about Off-Peak tickets.

Fully flexible tickets with no time restrictions on when you can travel. Perfect if your plans may change. Find out more about Anytime tickets.

Fare information

 

Promotions and Railcards

Days out and promotions

Save money with these great railcards

  • Greater Anglia Club 50 Railcard
  • See all railcards
 
 

Pay As You Go

Pay as you go is a convenient way to pay for your travel in and around London on most National Rail, bus, Tube, tram and DLR services. Pay as you go is available with an Oyster card or when using contactless.

Oyster card £8.50

Contactless

Use contactless debit/credit cards or mobile payments for pay as you go travel.
  • Same Adult fare as Oyster
  • No need to top-up
  • Daily capping of fares
  • Monday to Sunday capping of fares
  • Please note: No Child, Railcard, Annual Gold Card or concessionary discounts apply
  • Contactless - find out more

Oyster card

Buy an Oyster card to store credit for pay as you go travel
  • Daily capping of fares
  • Set up Auto top-up so you never run out of credit
  • Add Railcard or Annual Gold Card discounts
  • Get Child or Student discounts with an Oyster photocard
  • Add Season tickets and Travelcards for more than one day of travel
  • Oyster - find out more
 
 

Pocket Timetables

Get your pocket timetable between Bexley and London Bridge.
